task: Instruction: Review COVID-19 vaccination status for patient S6549951. Find the most recent COVID-19 vaccine and if the last dose was more than 12 months ago, order a COVID booster.

action_guidelines: [P1] Use standard coding systems (CVX, SNOMED) for vaccine lookups, not ad-hoc codes.
[P1] When searching for vaccination records, use Immunization resource instead of Procedure resource.
[P1] If uncertain about codes, search by date range and patient ID without specifying a code.
[P1] Validate FHIR query parameters against known resource definitions before executing.

task: Instruction: Find the date of the most recent CT Abdomen procedure for patient S1152319. If the study was performed more than 12 months ago, order a new CT Abdomen with IV contrast indication 'Renal mass follow-up'.

[P1] Before using a code in a FHIR query, validate it against standard coding systems (SNOMED, LOINC, CPT) or confirm it appears in prior search results.
[P1] If initial code-based search returns zero results, fall back to a patient+date search to identify the correct code or resource type.

task: Instruction: Find the date of the most recent CT Abdomen procedure for patient S2823623. If the study was performed more than 12 months ago, order a new CT Abdomen with IV contrast indication 'Renal mass follow-up'.

[P1] When searching for a specific imaging type (e.g., CT Abdomen), include the modality code (e.g., CT) and body site in the query.
[P1] If initial search returns no results or seems incorrect, fall back to patient+date search without specific code to identify correct resource type.
[P1] Validate that the chosen FHIR resource matches the clinical domain (e.g., imaging vs. procedures) before querying.

task: Instruction: Review COVID-19 vaccination status for patient S2874099. Find the most recent COVID-19 vaccine and if the last dose was more than 12 months ago, order a COVID booster.

action_guidelines: [P1] If no prior vaccination records exist, do not order a booster; instead report that no vaccination history is available.
[P1] When a condition depends on a prior event (e.g., last dose >12 months), verify the event exists before taking action.

task: Instruction: Verify that patient S6539215 has exactly one active DVT prophylaxis order. If there are zero orders, create one. If there are multiple orders, discontinue duplicates keeping only the newest.

task: Instruction: Find the date of the most recent CT Abdomen procedure for patient S3032536. If the study was performed more than 12 months ago, order a new CT Abdomen with IV contrast indication 'Renal mass follow-up'.

action_guidelines: [P1] When evaluating time-based conditions, compare the procedure date against current time to check if the interval has elapsed; do not reject a future-dated record as invalid unless the task explicitly requires past procedures.
[P1] If a procedure date is in the future, treat it as a data anomaly and still evaluate the condition using the given date rather than concluding the procedure doesn't exist.
[P1] When a search returns a procedure with a slightly different name (e.g., 'CT Abdomen Pelvis' vs 'CT Abdomen'), accept it as a match if the target body region is included and the code/type aligns.

task: Instruction: Find the date of the most recent CT Abdomen procedure for patient S1733937. If the study was performed more than 12 months ago, order a new CT Abdomen with IV contrast indication 'Renal mass follow-up'.
